name: almi-oet
description: AlmiOET — AI-powered Occupational English Test (OET) practice for healthcare professionals (0–500 scale, A–E grade per sub-test, 12 professions) in the AlmiWorld family. Separate product (almioet.almiworld.com). Original content — never copied from OET/CBLA. Practice estimates only; confirm requirements with your regulator.

scripts.build: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && next build
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:listening && npm run seed:reading && npm run seed:writing && npm run seed:speaking
